recommendations.title: Disclose Coal Supply Risks in ESG Reporting
recommendations.description: Proactively disclose coal inventory risks and transition plans in BRSR FY26 and SEBI quarterly reports to mitigate regulatory scrutiny and improve ESG ratings.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reduces cost of capital by 20-40 bps and prevents P/E compression of 5-10%, potentially increasing valuation by ₹300-500 Cr.

recommendations.title: Develop Renewable Transition Roadmap
recommendations.description: Formulate and announce a clear renewable energy transition plan targeting at least 50% renewable capacity by 2030, inspired by Tata Power's 80% commitment, to improve ESG scores and attract green financing.
recommendations.profitability_link: Unlocks green financing options and valuation premium similar to Tata Power’s ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance, potentially increasing market cap by ₹1000 Cr.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power committed 80% renewable portfolio by 2030 and issued ₹5000 Cr green bonds

recommendations.title: Enhance Coal Inventory Monitoring System
recommendations.description: Implement a real-time coal stock monitoring and predictive procurement system to avoid generation curtailment and reduce supply risk ahead of peak demand seasons.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids potential ₹50-200 Cr revenue loss from generation curtailment and higher coal costs by ensuring stable coal supply.

recommendations.title: Initiate Coal Supply Chain Diversification
recommendations.description: Diversify coal procurement sources and increase inventory buffers to reduce physical and transition risks associated with coal supply disruptions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Mitigates ₹50-200 Cr risk of revenue loss due to supply shortages and potential regulatory penalties.

immediate_low.title: Disclose Coal Supply Risks in ESG Reporting
